title: sorghum commutatum
intro: Sorghum commutatum, also known as silver bur-marigold, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of sorghum commutatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of sorghum commutatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
